title: metrosideros linearis
intro: Metrosideros linearis, also known as the New Zealand Christmas tree, is a species of flowering plant native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are derived from its leaves and bark. The health benefits of Metrosideros linearis include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and fighting off infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or tincture, or used in topical creams and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
